requirement.desc: 实现一个低通滤波器，截止频率10Hz，符合MISRA-C标准与DAL-A级别要求

outputs.contract:
component: lowpass_filter_10hz
version: 1.0.0
safety_level: DAL-A
traceability: [REQ-001]
interface:
  inputs:
    - name: raw_input
      type: double
      range: [0, 20000]
  outputs:
    - name: filtered_output
      type: double
contracts:
  preconditions:
    - "raw_input != NULL"
  postconditions:
    - "filtered_output >= 0"
  invariants:
    - "sample_rate == 100Hz"
  fault_handling:
    - "if raw_input < 0 || raw_input > 20000: set fault_detected = true"
